And since they are so very intense and you're going to have a hard time putting them down, well that can be a bit of a problem lol. (Imagine calling off work because you just can't bear to stop reading it! 😉 )

Still not sure? Ok, so on to the amazing third book Kings of Lore and Legend.
I found this book to be full of surprises and very unexpected twists and turns! I found myself thoroughly flabbergasted by a particular twist in this book (one of many!). Blown away! It was NOT something anything the previous books even hinted at being possible, and came TOTALLY out of the blue! Talk about sideswiped from your blind spot! And nope, sorry, no spoilers! You want to know? Keep reading!

Still with me? Honestly, I'm not sure if I'm disappointed that I haven't convinced you yet, or flattered that you seem to want to REALLY know my thoughts on the ENTIRE series!

Either way, here we find ourselves at book four, Child of Night and Day.
So, remember my mentioning earlier that each book is quite a bit longer? Well that means book four is the longest thus far in the series! And yet I found when I read it I just COULDN'T put it down! I spent every spare minute I had before and after work reading it in Kindle. My night off work I spent 7 hours with it and still didn't get it finished because it is so very intense that you cannot just breeze through it.(And no, I don't have any reading issues, I generally can breeze through a book in a day or two of normal reading habits!) All 4 books are intense and each one is longer than the preceding one, but this one just seemed to be the most intense at this point! When I did finally finish it, I was both looking forward to reading book 5 and sad that it was going to be the final book. I didn't want to leave this world! And because I OWN these books, I can visit at any time now! And trust me, I'll definitely be re reading them often!

And last, but by no means least, we've come to When Heroes Fall, that final book. (crying again!! Where's my tissues?!!)
This final book in the series picked up right where the previous book left off. It was, in fact, as if the author was writing a superbook, but it just got to be too unwieldy, (even as a ebook!) and so he said, this sentence will be the final one in this, book four, and the next sentence will be the first sentence in book five! AND I bit my nails down to nubs waiting for this book to be released!
I was very lucky myself when it came to getting this book though. By this time I had joined the authors fan site, and when he asked if anyone wanted a ARC, Advance Reader Copy, in exchange for a honest review, mine was the first hand in the air! After all I had already done reviews, and had planned to continue, so what the heck! Gimmee! (and NO he didn't give me a box set for this review! I mean, really? That's where your mind went? I've already TOLD you I've OWNED all these books since LAST year!)
Like the preceding books it's very intense, and very long. I was totally engrossed from page 1!
No spoilers, as mentioned, but this book has us meeting many new, strange peoples, and uncovers some vipers. Battles are breaking out all over! And as can be guessed, it's all leading up to the ultimate FINAL BATTLE! And yes, as the title implies, some heroes die. Fortunately the author believes in realism even in fantasy fiction. No battles are ever fought without loss of life on both sides. It would be unrealistic if, on the winning side, no one but minor characters died. And so I cried over those deaths, but I also rejoiced over the win.

And I also cried over the fact that this is the last book in the series. I will miss these people and this world. I hope the author revisits this world again with more books, maybe a new series.

So there you go. If you're still with me, WOW! Talk about stamina!!! But please trust me. This set is well worth not only the price, but the time it will take you to read it! Enjoy! I certainly did! 😉
top_rant.title: How lucky YOU are! Want to know why? Read on!

top_rant.text:
These are three of the most profound, emotional, powerful and alluring romances I’ve ever read. The visceral feelings of happiness, sadness, devastation, passion and romance are so beautifully written, that they spill from the page into your heart. It’s beautiful. Don’t miss these books. Plus, I guarantee that once you read them you will be hooked to her writing.

Here’s my review for each book:

❤️WHEN FOREVER CHANGES:

It’s funny how when you read a book, everyone comes away from it feeling differently or affected differently than everyone else. I read this book as a buddy read with Amber, my friend. Well, Amber and I had different feelings about this book when we finished. We both cried our hearts out, but for different reasons.

Ok..now about the book our wonderful, awesome, talented Siobhan Davis, wrote for us to read. The woman truly knows how to open her heart and bleed her words on to the pages. It’s the most beautiful experience there ever was. If you haven’t had a Siobhan Davis experience, you’re missing out.

For me the experience of the book was of a boy who loved a girl since he was very young, and she was younger, and she never took notice because she was in love with some one else. Heartbreaking...totally.

His name was, Slater. Her name was Gabrielle. But he called her Belle, and was the ONLY one who did. She was obsessed with Beauty and the Beast when she was little, and Slater used to tease her saying she wanted to be Belle for access to the library. But he was only partly right. She did daydream about being Belle, but she was no different than any young girl her age, and she wanted to be her for the prince. Not the books! Anyway, the name stuck, and Slater called her Belle ever since then.

She dated this other boy she loved, Dylan, for many years, until in college he began to change and not be so nice, and they broke up. Her family was there for her, she had an amazing family. I really loved her family. And her brother Ryan, who she was very close to had her move in with him. Now Slater is Ryan’s best friend, has been since childhood, and a member of the family. He is one of Ryan’s roommates too. Slater wants to be there for Belle too.

"You’ll find someone amazing, Belle. Someone who sets your world on fire. Someone who appreciates how beautiful and special and intelligent and caring you are, and he’ll be the luckiest bastard because he’ll get to spend the rest of his life with you in it." ~ Slater

So Belle starts to realize she has feelings for Slater. Feelings that maybe were always there, but she didn’t notice because she was so in love with Dylan at the time. So they fall head over heels in love. So much passion, so much love.

"I’d do anything for you, Belle. Anything." Slater was loyal, devoted and totally in love with Belle. She meant the world to him.

Then there was news. Seemed like great news.
Then there was a tragedy.
Everything spiraling for Slater.

Can I just say I cried buckets for Slater....for SLATER!!! Yes, you heard me right!! It’s funny, but he is the character I identified with throughout this story.
And this is a long story. This isn’t one of your ok this happens, then this, then they lived happily ever after. Lol! This could have easily been two books full of DRAMA!!! When I say drama, I mean HEAVY DRAMA, EMOTIONAL, CRYING, SOBBING!!!!! Like I say, for me it was for Slater. But for someone else it could, and MOST LIKELY would have been for someone else!!!

After all is said and done about the crying, and who is crying for who. The thing of it is, the beauty of this story. Siobhan took to writing and opened her heart and poured it out and wrote a story that could affect us in this way. That could make some people cry for some characters and other people cry for other characters. I know she didn’t plan this, but when she opened her heart and bled on the paper, this is what happened. If she planned it too much, it wouldn’t have worked out this way.

This has been the hardest review I have ever written. I hope it’s not all over the place.

❤️INSEPARABLE:

I’m still feeling "all the feels" from this book. This is the BEST DA*N BOOK I HAVE EVER READ!!!! I’m not exaggerating!! This is my ALL TIME FAVORITE BOOK IN THE WHOLE WORLD!!!!!! I’M YELLING....I CAN’T HELP IT!!!! I FEEL LIKE I WANT TO YELL IT FROM MY ROOFTOP SO EVERYONE KNOWS WHAT A GREAT BOOK THIS IS!!!!!!!

Ok....now that I got that out, for now. Inseparable is a book of such depth, such emotion, that there is absolutely NO WAY I could have read this in 24 hrs. I mean, give me a RomCom or ChicLit and no problem, but a book like this NO WAY. I needed emotional breaks, breathers. This book is packed full of so much that goes on in the lives of the three main characters. The depth of emotion, it was so beautiful. The subjects this book touched on (and there were a few of them) were so emotional and touching. I want to talk about how well she touched on these subjects, but I can’t without giving anything away. But, Siobhan Davis has shown what a truly skilled writer she is. Touching on some pretty difficult emotions and experiences, and making us feel as if we were experiencing them ourselves. I felt as if I had to stop and catch my breath at times. But the beauty of it is, we are not just being entertained by a beautiful story, but we are learning a little more what people go through and therefore developing empathy for them. Pure magic, that’s what Ms. Davis has performed with her writing...pure magic.

Do yourself a favor and read the story of the Inseparable friendship of three friends, Ayden, Devin and Angelina. You may be like me and yelling out how it’s the best da*n book you’ve ever read!! I have no doubt, I am absolutely sure you’ll love it!!

❤️ONLY EVER YOU

I want to start my review off by saying, THIS BOOK IS PHENOMENAL!! This is to me, the author’s best work up to date. It is obvious she put a lot of work, research and heart into this book.

But, this book affected me quite a bit. I actually had to read it twice, in order to feel like I was in the “right place” to give it a proper review.

When Ryder and Zeta are teenagers in juvie, coming from really bad backgrounds, it’s obvious off and on that Ryder deals with depression, anxiety and panic disorder. The counselor there is helping him and it works while he’s there. Keeping routine and structure in his day, leaving a situation before becoming angry (he has anger management issues) and learning how to cope in an anxiety attack. But when he starts to build a relationship with Zeta in there, little things that affect him, or how he handles things, shows he has mental issues. Then on the outside life becomes too much. Especially as a rock star and being split up from Zeta, and then Ryder also ends up becoming an addict. Throughout the book you can see his mental problems culminating for so many reasons that I don’t want to give away. But let’s just say that this book is not just extremely emotional, it’s hard to handle. When I say that, I mean I had to take a break from the turmoil of the story. There’s so much. BUT....IT IS WORTH GETTING THROUGH TO THE END!!!!

The characters in this book are so real. All of them. Some of the side characters I just loved! A couple I wanted to strangle. Then there were those I really hated. But Ryder & Zeta were special. Zeta...she was such a strong-willed girl. She overcame so much in her life, that no girl should ever have to go through. From a young age too. My heart went out to Zeta. She had such a big heart and when she loved she loved big. Ryder...my heart breaks just saying his name. He went from such a broken teenager (from a young age) to an even more broken man. Zeta was his only salvation. It was extremely heart wrenching to watch this grown man spiral. He loved Zeta more than anything, and he loved big! He loved his music, but getting lost in his music wasn’t enough.
The band mates were all close. Some of them were instigators of trouble for Ryder, if you ask me. But I guess that how band life can be. Lots of partying. But they were family.

This book pulled out so many feelings. Maybe not for every reader. But I know for quite a few, so far. But in the end it pulls out some more feelings, and they will be happy, satisfied and you will feel fulfilled as a reader. This book is definitely not one to be missed! If there is one new book you buy to read for the year, make it this one and you won’t be sorry!!!

⬆️ There you are. Three AMAZING books ALL IN ONE COLLECTION, for one LOW price!! DON’T PASS THIS ONE UP!!!! ⬆️
top_rant.title: Three Amazing Books In One Collection!!

top_rant.text:
ℂ𝕠𝕟𝕗𝕖𝕤𝕤𝕚𝕠𝕟 𝕆𝕗 𝔸 𝔹𝕚𝕓𝕝𝕚𝕠𝕡𝕙𝕚𝕝𝕖’𝕤 𝕆𝕧𝕖𝕣𝕒𝕝𝕝 ℝ𝕒𝕥𝕚𝕟𝕘:

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ 𝟙/𝟚 – OMG! Venom and the realm of Rosewood blew me away! Venom is a dark and twisted retelling of Tinkerbell, Peter Pan, & the infamous Captain Hook BUT this time around, the good guys aren’t such good guys, and the bad guys are even badder!

🔥🔥🔥🔥 – Although a bit of a slow burn between the Captain and Tinksley, when they do catch fire they burnnnn!!! HOLY CRAP YA’LL, that table scene… SHEESH! 😍😍😍

🌪 ℂ𝕝𝕚𝕗𝕗𝕙𝕒𝕟𝕘𝕖𝕣 𝕎𝕒𝕣𝕟𝕚𝕟𝕘: Nope, no cliffhanger. Hook and Tink’s story wrapped up beautifully BUTTTT this is only the beginning of the interconnected Sinister Fairy Tales Collection so there was most definitely some intrigue and mystery left to still be discovered in the next book, Cold Queen!

❝ Can I keep you, Tinksley? As my finest treasure?❞

Venom by Dee Garcia is the first standalone in a series of interconnected standalone from the Sinister Fairy Tale Collections! Venom is a dark and twisted retelling of Tinkerbell, Peter Pan, & the infamous Captain Hook BUT this time around, the good guys aren’t such good guys, and the bad guys are even badder! I’m not a huge PNR reader but once I saw that there were quite a few lovely ladies that I ALWAYS one-click, I knew this was a series that I couldn’t pass up!

In Venom we aren’t in Neverland, no. We are in Rosewood with Captain ‘Callum’ Hook, Tinksley, and Peter Pan.

Welcome to the mythical, magical realm of Rosewood!

❝ Forgive me, Tinksley. When it’s all said and done, please forgive me. It was the only way.❞

Captain ‘Callum’ Hook, my oh my this was a totally different Captain Hook then we have all met in the past. For starters, he doesn’t actually have a hook, BUT he IS a vampire pirate! Crazy, I know right?! But trust me, it all makes sense and you are going to LOVE it! Captain Callum has left his pirating ways and now runs Rosewood.

❝ Where she’s purity and light, I’m maleficence and darkness.❞

Tinksley Bell is a beautiful young half-ling. A.K.A a fairy and a fae had a baby and that baby is Tinksley! She is the definition of innocence BUT, Tinksley isn’t as “innocent” as everyone thinks she is. She’s sassy, impulsive, and completely reckless and she is SICK of everyone treating her like a child. So in her quest to rebel, she slowly but surely falls for Peter Pan…

❝ I really am that broken now. As mangled as he left my heart.❞

But Peter isn’t the guy that Tinksley thinks he is. It’s a mystery to everyone as to how Peter ended up in Rosewood, to begin with, and while the rest of the community keeps their distance, Tink continues to fall for his smooth lines and charming boyish features. Completely blinding her to Hook’s feelings for her.

But with a greater plan at play, Hook has to sit back, wait, and watch while Peter breaks poor Tinksley’s heart. But then he will get his chance to help Tinksley put her pieces back together… only BETTER than ever before. Hook has had feelings for Tinksley for a very long time but with Peter holding her captivated she didn’t SEE him the way he has ALWAYS seen her.

❝ He had her… and I wanted her. And it’s been that way ever since.❞

But sooner rather than later… Hook will finally get his chance.

❝ I’m not above taking, shamelessly so. Have stolen many a treasure over the years. Trust me when I say I know what valuable looks like. And that’s exactly what Tinksley is: the most valuable treasure of them all.❞

Mystery, betrayal, secrets, lies, lust, and love, top that with some mythical creatures and a dark twist on a childhood favorite, and you have the phenomenon that is VENOM! This isn’t the Disney Peter Pan that we all know and love, ohhhh noooo! This is the dark ADULT version of the childhood favorite. Just be ready, because this is as far from the original story as you can get. All the same characters are here but the story its self and the persona of the characters are COMPLETELY different! Absolutely unique and original, and unlike anything I’ve ever read before.

❝ Tinksley is my time. And time is precious.❞

In Act One, I wasn’t sure how I felt about Tinksley. She wasn’t my favorite character, unfortunately. In Act Two I started feeling a bit different, she went through sooo much and my heart was breaking for her. In Act Three, HOLY CRAP! Tinksley went from cute and innocent to completely FIERCE and I loved watching her transformation throughout the book.

❝ Show me, Hook. I want to see your little wonderland of debauchery.❞

Hook, GAHHH! What is there not to love about Callum Hook?!?! He was a brooding, intense, bad *** vampire. Both feared and adored by his subjects, who held a soft spot in his heart only for Tinksley. He was fiercely protective of her and although he ALWAYS wanted to claim her, he knew that she needed to figure things out by herself before he could swoop in and make her finally SEE him.

❝ I’ve corrupted that little pixie with a singular swipe of my tongue.❞

The mysterious, forever young and adorable Peter Pan we all know and love is GONE! In his place is a vile boy who uses lies to get his way and hurt the one person who has always loved and been there for him.

Honestly, if I could have changed ANYTHING, it would have been that we would have gotten more time with Tink and Callum together as a couple. Most of the book was Tink heartbroken and then fighting her feelings for Hook and turning him down even though he had been nothing but good to her throughout. But, once they FINALLY got on the same page this book was ON FIRE! 🔥🔥🔥 I mean that table scene… SHEW! I know I was blushing even reading it, and I read DIRTYYYY books! I would have LOVED to see what other trouble these two could have gotten up to together…

❝ I want to devour her, consume her, possess her, ******* own her.❞

The WOW moment… the whole catalyst for what was going to “trigger” Tinksley… I’m rarely ever completely surprised but HOLY CRAP I NEVER saw that coming!

The secondary/supporting characters were all VERY interesting and there were definitely a few that had me very intrigued. Mostly from Captain Hook’s crew, you’ll see why once you read Venom but I am very excited to read their stories!

I absolutely adore Dee Garcia and have LOVED everything she has written so I was sooo excited to see how her first attempt at PNR turned out. THE GIRL KILLED IT!!! I was blown away and she did it WITHOUT completely changing up HER style of writing, which I was extremely happy to see. The way she describes and sets scenes with her words, the way she crafts a visual picture in your mind… I can’t even put it into words. Absolutely amazing author. Garcia has set the bar pretty dang high with Venom being the start of this interconnected Sinister Fairy Tales Collection. If it is any indication of what’s to come then I can’t wait to see what the rest of these amazing authors have in store for us as they retell these classic fairytales but with a dark twist and their own unique styles.

If you are a fan of the dark and twisted, and also love those old fairytales then you NEED to check out Venom! This is not one to be missed for sure! HIGHLY, HIGHLY RECOMMEND!

❝ Then start counting on forever, Tinksley Bell, because you’re my greatest treasure and there’s not a single thing within any realm on this earth that could make me let you go.❞

𝕀 𝕧𝕠𝕝𝕦𝕟𝕥𝕒𝕣𝕚𝕝𝕪 𝕣𝕖𝕧𝕚𝕖𝕨𝕖𝕕 𝕒𝕟 𝕒𝕕𝕧𝕒𝕟𝕔𝕖 𝕔𝕠𝕞𝕡𝕝𝕚𝕞𝕖𝕟𝕥𝕒𝕣𝕪 𝕔𝕠𝕡𝕪 𝕠𝕗 𝕥𝕙𝕚𝕤 𝕓𝕠𝕠𝕜.
top_rant.title: ❝ Can I keep you, Tinksley? As my finest treasure?❞

top_rant.text:
WOW! I ABSO-FANGING-LUTELY love, Love, LOVE this series! Selena blew me away from the start and I eagerly awaited, then devoured, each new book and I was NEVER, EVER, disappointed!! Honestly, this is one innovative, creative and DRAGONTACULAR series like no other! Selena’s phenomenal talent brings this story to life, connecting me to the multifaceted characters, living their stories with, for and AS them! I absolutely love the ingenuity and brilliance of this series as a whole, the attention to detail, the characters, plot, storylines, the creation of the Dragon Realm and portal to our Earth, and so much more! Since I read & reviewed each book on its own and just can’t combine them to get my love and excitement through in one short review, I thought it best to share them in full here!

Chosen by the Dragon - OH. HOLY. ORACLE. What an ABSO-SHIFTING-LUTELY DRAGONTACULAR book!!! I am COMPLETELY BLOWN AWAY by the uniqueness of the story, the wholly originality of EVERYTHING! The concept of the Dragon Realm, the portals, the harvest moon, the Oracle, the King and his "breeding" ways, the hierarchy, the history and Dragon ways of life, JUST ALL OF IT!!! I became Lucy, grabbed then tossed into this book to live another life, a life I didn't want... except for Amos! This book literally caught me in its tight grip and NEVER let me go! The story is so passionately intense, its hot, Hot, HOT but so DRAGONGASMIC! There is a lot of naughty CARNALICIOUS activity, but for me, it fit the story! It escalated with the now very real position that Lucy is in - stuck in, I might add - it enflamed up even higher with and for Amos, and it made this story EXPLODE through me! *dreamy sigh* But what a DRAGONLICIOUSLY way to go!! There are so many unique lines, quotes, thoughts, etc. that make this book a Dragon breath of fresh Dragon air, and I will even go as far as to say that it stands alone, even ABOVE a lot of the many other Dragon Shifter books out today!! I love, Love, LOVE it THAT much!! This is Selena's debut release but I honestly would never have guessed it!! After reading this book, it’s obvious to me that Selena has a tremendous wealth of talent and a genuine gift. The ingenuity and brilliance of this story as a whole, the attention to detail, the characters, plot, storylines, the creation of the Dragon Realm and portal to our Earth, and so much more, all flawlessly come together to bring this majestic SHIFTACULAR story to life.

The Dragon's Touch - HOLY DRAGON'S FIRE!! What a MAGNIFISCENT story!! Zara & Solar certainly get one helluva DRAGONTACULAR story and then some! I adored Zara from the first time I met her in Chosen by the Dragon (The Dragon Realm book 1) but never considered that I could love her as deeply as I do now!! Of course with this book taking place four years later, it means that we get to tag along with, even become Zara right at that BITEGASMIC time in a young female dragon shifters life where EVERYTHING will change regardless if she wants it to or not!! And yes, that does mean that we, I mean Zara, is in for one very hilarious, frustrating, hot & MATETACULAR adventure like no other!! There are so many aspects to this story (and series) that I love, Love, LOVE, it's almost impossible to list them all! A couple of key ones are the multifaceted characters that I almost effortlessly & seamlessly became as well as the exceptionally well written & developed plots & storylines both for this story and the series. The tremendously talented Selena has such an amazing, magical, PERFECT way with words, breathing a fresh breath of Dragon Fire into her storytelling, creating stories that I NEVER want to end, that I CANNOT get enough of! I love, Love, LOVE how exceptionally ingenious every part of Selena’s Dragon Realm series is! From the overall concept to the characters, the storylines, the differences between humans & dragons and how & why they can intermingle (or not!), but I especially love the fertility season and the dragon "chastity belt"! I giggle every time I think about it! The way that Selena wrote Zara’s innocence – she captured the virginity aspect of someone who truly is innocent perfectly! I am in awe of Selena's ability to create all of these SCALETASTIC features that has each story bursting to full color life in my mind so I get the FULLEST reading experience possible!! Add in some pretty hilarious phrases, thoughts & lines and you are in for one DRAGONLICIOUS treat that will keep you engaged from the tip of the snout to the very end of the tail! I mean, from the very beginning all the way through to the very end of this MATERRIFIC Happily Ever After Tail! I was captured by her stories in a very similar way that Solar is by Zara, except instead of her new scent, it’s the heart & soul of Selena, her books & characters that have captivated me for life! wink Just like Zara, I love, Love, LOVE The Dragon's Touch and I CANNOT get enough of it!

Dragon's Desire - What a DRAGONTACULAR story!! I am beyond thrilled and so excited that O gets his own story and what a story it is! And so much more funnier, hotter, amazing and AWESOME then I ever could have hoped for!!! Right from the moment I met The Oracle I was intrigued and it didn't take long to come to love him! But the more I got to know him and then when I discovered everything he did for Amos & Lucy in their book (Chosen by the Dragon, book 1 in this series), well let's just say that my heart melted & my love increased tenfold! And Mel! Well, Mel is one amazing character! I can't help but admire her, love her and want to be her! She is so entertaining, friendly, hilarious, gorgeous inside & out, and of course PERFECT for O! Thankfully Selena's magical storytelling has me living it all with & as the characters, so for a couple of hours I get to be Mel & have the hunkelicious O for myself! wink There are no mere words to describe just how enthralling and awesome this story (and series) is! I can say that it is a little bit lighthearted, a little bit intense, very romantic, hot & sexy, extremely entertaining and EVERYTHING that a great book should be! Or at least EVERYTHING that I want, hope and love in a great book! But it is also so much more than that! I ABSO-FLAMING-LUTELY love, Love, LOVE Selena's writing style & way with words! The phrases she uses, the way they are used had me BEYOND immensely enjoying every little bit of it! Like when O "screeched at his first sip of cold Coke. He’d said it had been like battery acid. But, like, in a good way." There are lots more that had me smiling, giggling and outright laughing, or panting & fanning myself! There are a few moments that were so tender, touching and/or romantic that it had me in tears! There are so many reasons, too many to count, why you should read - why you NEED to read - this book & the series, but to list them all would not only take forever, but would also ruin the whole "reading/living/experiencing it all for yourself" part too! After all, isn't that the purpose of reading in the first place?! I will start with saying that Selena truly is a phenomenally talented and genuinely gifted author whom I discovered just as she was releasing her debut book and I am both blessed & honored to be able to join her on her journey as she sees her Author Dreams come true! I have read each book as they have been released and I have thoroughly & immensely enjoyed every little bit of them! In fact, I love Selena's stories so much, reading them is a genuine treat that I cherish, and eagerly await every new release so that I can DEVOUR it the second I get it! Give or take an hour or two! :)

Dragon's Passion - HOLY DRAGON FIRE!! What a TRULY PERFECT DRAGONTASTIC book that's fit for a King!! I was blown away by just how much I love, Love, LOVED IT!! Idris had my attention from the get-go, even though I didn't really understand why, other than it was obviously his story! He's so "different" than the other guys – in a good way - but not in a way I can explain or try to explain without giving anything away! Isla... now how to explain her? She definitely wasn't who I thought she was initially, but that's what made me love her!! And YUP! That's all I'm saying!! wink I think that this story is truly something you have to - NEED TO - read for yourself!! And if you read the prequel and books 1-3 in this series first, it will make this story all that much more enjoyable, more humorous, more loving, more.. just MORE DRAGONLICIOUS! Reading this book, the further in I got - especially the last half - I had chills, goosebumps, alternating with hot flashes, flames throughout my body from the power of this story, the way I felt like I was LIVING - TRULY LIVING EVERY SINGLE BIT OF IT - like it a prophecy of my life coming true! Like it is MY LIFE PERIOD!! Having read this whole series from the moment Selena released it only added to the connection, the richness, the True Power that radiates out, encapsulating me in its arms, wings, in its heart. This ending is even more than I could have ever hoped for! It's a double-edged sword though - awesome, perfect and the most regal of all endings! But that is also the problem - it IS The End! Selena had me falling in love with her characters - human & dragon alike - right from the prequel! She had me captivated & completely consumed by her beautiful, lush, deeply enriched storytelling, her magically unique Dragon Realm and of course her exceptional, hilarious, hot & sexy cast of characters!!! Selena Scott may be a new author, but with her charm, phenomenal talent and passionate gift for crafting these amazing stories, you would never know it! I love, Love, LOVE her Dragon Realm series and eagerly (if a little sad at leaving her dragons behind!) look forward to reading ALL of her books for many, many years to come!!
top_rant.title: A Dragon series you NEED TO READ!!!  20 GOLD STARS (4 books + 5 GOLD STARS each)

top_rant.text:
I read the ENTIRE series of ‘Dark Secrets’ by Angela M Hudson and it was INCREDIBLE 🤯🤯🤯! (FYI, I’m not affiliated with the author, not in the book biz, reading is just a HOBBY, and I’m just a regular reader that is super passionate 💗 about spreading the word on GREAT books!) There are NO spoilers 🙌🏻!

OK ✅! So this is a series of 15 books (9 main books, and 6 spin-offs!) I read these BEFORE I started writing these emoji 🤪 reviews (which is why there wasn’t one written before!) But there are several series like this that I want to circle ⭕️ back to and write ✍️ an emoji review ... and thought I’d kick it off 🦵 with this one 👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻!

This will give you EVERYTHING you need to know 🙌🏻… without spoilers 🥳... to determine if this series is for you 💕! There are TONS of posts about this series on FB and I’m going to try to answer all those questions 🙌🏻!!

So first off 🤗! What is the series even about?! Well! It actually starts off A LOT like Twilight 🧛(sorry Angie 😆!) After a tragedy, Ara travels from Australia 🇦🇺 to America 🇺🇸 to live with her dad and go to highschool 🏫 ! Where she then meets a HANDSOME, GREEN eyed 👀 … vampire 😱! He’s MYSTERIOUS 🕵️‍♂️ and she’s SMITTEN 😍! NO ONE has EVER held his attention before like Ara ❤️ and we soon get swept into a sweet romance 💘…. UNTIL… well… BOOM 💥! We DON’T 😵! Muhahahahaa 😈😈😈! By the end of the first book you realize this is NOT TWILIGHT 🩸! It’s an entirely UNIQUE and CRAZY 😲 story that kicks off at the MASQUERADE 🎭 BALL (FYI around 80% into first book!) and the insane ride doesn’t stop until the FINAL book 😱!

So much to say 👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻! OK! The BIGGEST thing to mention is this author is a MASTERMIND 🧠 (aka EVIL 😈 MASTERMIND!) at plot twists 🌪 ! You LITERALLY have NO idea what is going to happen next! EVERY book is like PEELING away a layer of an ONION 🧅 to only find out in the FINAL book you were eating an ORANGE 🍊 ALL ALONG! A very, VERY large COMPLICATED ORANGE 😂😂😂!) There is soooo much EMOTION 😩 in these books! You literally want to THROW your DEVICE 📱 (seriously, Angie!! … you NEED a device throwing warning ⚠️!) … and other times, you want to SOB 😭 away with a box of tissues and a bottle of wine 🍷!

These characters!! BOY, can they annoy the CRAP out of you 😂😂😂! But at the SAME time, you still feel SO attached to their journeys! We have our main girl, Ara 👗, who starts off super immature (she is YOUNG!!) … but does GROW 🌱 as the series progresses 👏🏻! YES, the first book takes place in highschool. BUT 🤚🏻! After that, it launches 🚀 into a more ADULT series (and thank you 🙏🏻 thank you 🙏🏻 thank you 🙏🏻 Angie that she is no longer in high school 🥳!) DAVID, Ara’s handsome green-eyed 👀 VAMP, is actually the PURE definition of EVIL 👿! But he’s HOT 🥵 as well (so there’s that 😅!) Seriously, it is sooooo REFRESHING 🌬 to get a VAMPIRE 🧛 story where the VAMPIRES actually don’t give a YOU KNOW WHAT about eating their FOOD 🩸! Oh & get this!! … HOT 🥵 David has a HOT 🥵 BROTHER… a TWIN BROTHER 😮! JASON!! Oh my goodness… JASE ❤️ JASE ❤️ JASE ❤️… nom 🤤 nom 🤤 nom 🤤! Let me tell you, LOVING ❤️‍🔥 on DAVID or LOVING ❤️‍🔥 on JASE is like FIGHTING 🤺 words 🤣🤣🤣! People tend to be DIEHARD 😍 David fans or DIEHARD 😍 Jase fans! And YES… this is a LOVE ❤️ TRIANGLE 🔺! But! For those of you who don’t like them… just KNOW 💡… the author is BIG TIME into HEA’s and you WILL GET ONE 🥳… for EVERYONE 🙌🏻… errrr … EVENTUALLY 🤣😂🤣! HONESTLY, there are so many twists 🌪 & turns ↩️, I didn’t even know who Ara would end up with until Book 15 😲😲😲! And there is NO way you can guess this ending BTW! I PROMISE ✌🏻!

Now speaking of books… YES… there are A LOT 😆! BUT! For those of you who don’t want to invest the time for 15 straight books… there are NATURAL breaking points along the way 🥳! Book 6 feels like it has a HEA 💘 at the end, so does Book 9 (it’s a spin-off) and so does Book 12 (it’s also a spin-off!) ANY of those times is a GREAT 👍🏻 time to take a break 🏝 and read something else for a bit (and then come back for MORE emotional devastation later 😂!) Cuz let me tell ya… this series is EMOTIONALLY DEVISTATING 😩😩😩! It has it's DARK moments… and a helluva lot of secrets 🤫… hence ‘DARK SECRETS!’ 😉😉😉 There may be some triggers for some (cough* cough* torture 🔪 ) but outside of THAT 😆, other than ABSOLUTE EMOTIONAL AGONY 😭😭😭… it’s not TOO bad compared to other dark series out there 👍🏻!!

And speaking of emotional AGONY 😩! HOLY BOJANGLES 😲! The three spin-offs ‘In Another Life’… WHAT. THE. HECK. ANGIE!!!!!!! 😩😩😩 I literally put my book down, walked to the gas station, bought a bottle of wine 🍷, got some tissues, and then SOBBED 😭😭😭 my eyes out while yep, continuing to reading IAL Book 3 😂😂😂! TO THIS DAY, with all the books I have read (and if you follow my reviews, you know there are QUITE a FEW 😉😂!,) I think this one takes the emotional CAKE 🎂! It was so GENIUS 💡, but SO HEARTBREAKING 💔💔💔! For all who wonder what’s the deal with the IAL books… it’s a VISION 💭 being shown to Ara of what COULD have happened. But it’s KEY 🔑 to the main saga, so they can’t be skipped! And if you thought the MAIN SAGA was BRUTAL 😩… WOW 😲… just imagine how bad THIS is since it is literally NOT the path that was chosen for Ara because it is MORE BRUTAL than the MAIN SAGA 😲😲😲!

A lot of people start this series and mistakenly think it is YA. And I GET IT 👌🏻! MOST of book 1 feels that way! But just HOLD on to your HATS 🎩 folks, it is soooooo NOT YA and once you get on that emotional rollercoaster 🎢 … it just does NOT STOP! There is STEAM 🔥 (NOT tons, but the non-romantic plotline is SO engrossing, you literally don’t care!) There is DRAMA 🎭 ! There are MIND BLOWING 🤯 twists 🌪 ! There is EMOTIONAL AGONY 😩😭😩! Honestly, it’s a BRILLIANT 💡series and the writing is TOP NOTCH 🤌🏻! This lady KNOWS what she is doing 👏🏻! There really is nothing else out there like this series! I usually try to say when recommending books… “If you like this series, then you’ll like this series.” But I LITERALLY CANNOT 🚫 with this one. There is NOTHING out there like this!!!

So if you LOVE to be constantly SUPRISED 😲 & SHOCKED 😵, you LOVE to read series that make you want to THROW YOUR BOOK 📕 (watch out, cuz it has happened to someone 😅!,) you LOVE the emotional AGONY 😩 of a love triangle 🔺 … but at the same time, LOVE that you KNOW 💡 it will ALL WORK OUT RIGHT in the end 💗💗💗… give this series a shot! It’s free on KU and you never know, it may JUST be the best kept SECRET 🤫 of a series that is PERFECTLY DARK 👌🏻 for you!

FYI Perfect Reading Order below (Spin-offs are CRUCIAL to main saga! Recommend getting the boxset with all books in the right order!)

💗Dark Secrets
💗The Heart's Ashes
💗Mark of Betrayal
💗Lies in Blood
💗Echoes: Part One of Echoes & Silence
💗Echoes: Part Two of Echoes & Silence
💜Bound 1 (spin-off)
💜Bound 2 (spin-off)
💗Bound by Secrets
🤍In Another Life 1 (spin-off)
🤍In Another Life 2 (spin-off)
🤍In Another Life 3 (spin-off)
🖤In My Blood (spin-off)
💗Heart of Darkness
💗Underworld

Dark Secrets (all 15 Books!) by Angela M. Hudson
top_rant.title: MOST UNPREDICTABLE SERIES EVER!

top_rant.text:
I have read all of these individually, but was so excited to see the box set come out! It’s a great deal and you get the beautiful bonus story too! Here are the reviews I had for each story. I just realized that I haven’t yet read Wild Wolf #4, so I will update my review as soon as I can.

Guardian Wolf #1 - He's perfect. He's the one. 5 GOLD ALPHA STARS

WHOOOWEEEEE!! All this fire, humor and a WOLFTASTIC story too?!!? Forget about a cold shower, I think I need to bathe under Niagara Falls...in the wintertime!!! The heat in this book is off the charts, but it is the best kind of heat! Heat that has Wolfy instincts behind it. "eyes lit with wolf fire, wolf passion." Heat with a story to back it and make it that much more powerful! I was so instantly drawn into this story, wanting to know the reasons why things are the way they are, why Lily has been denying her wolf - her very self - for so long. But I also wanted to know who the smokin' hot cowboy was! Since I live vicariously through my book friends, their life becoming mine, me bringing THEM to life for the length of the book, I oh so hoped that Lily was going to save a horse tonight! Hell for the rest of my life! I mean, her, for the rest of HER life! But more impressively is how well developed the story itself is. It is enriched and given depth by having a past that Lily hasn't yet dealt with, nor accepted; there are multiple packs, a Pack Council, rules, laws, Pack life & way of life. J.K. has included all of my favorite shifter features in here too! The wolf has her/his own personality, the increased senses in human form, how closely the halves truly are, just to name a few, but the features that I loved the most are the exact same ones I can't share with you! You will have to read this story to discover them all for yourself. Speaking of which, I LOVE how J.K. took the wolf shifter persona and made it all her own!! J.K. made falling into this world so easy with her mightily impressive magical writing skills! I was actually surprised at the intensity and range of emotions that I felt with this story! So very many funny lines, quotable lines and just all around FURRIFIC story! Leaving was the hardest part! (Thankfully I have the next book all ready to read.) Typically I want full length novels, however I am not sure if I could have survived more to Lily & Kieran's story! It is THAT WOLFTACULAR!!!! This may be my first J.K. Harper book, and it may always be my favorite (you never forget your first, right?) but I promise you it will NOT be the last!

Alpha Wolf #2 - When would she realize who he was to her? 5 GOLD ALPHA STARS

he knew it. Her wolf knew it, too. Her human remained the stubborn one, though. Just like a human. Silly. HOLY HEAVENLY WOLVES!!! I am completely blown away with this one! Sara is one FURRIFIC she-wolf hellbent on proving herself. Rafe is a WOLFSOME Alpha-in-waiting determined to get his mate. The story that ensues is a howling funny, uber hot, emotional & WOLFTASTIC one you do not want to miss! I love how each book (so far) has its own storyline yet there is also a secondary one that takes place over multiple books. (I am guessing it continues throughout the series based on the book blurbs.) There is absolutely no doubt in my mind that J.K. Harper is one exceptionally, magnificently and truly gifted author! The depth to this story & to the characters, the attention to details and the fascinating & enchanting way in which she told the story had me so enthralled that I couldn't have stopped reading if I tried! Well, not that I wanted to, but that's beside the point. I ABSO-FURRY-LUTELY LOVE how she has taken these wolf shifters and made them all her own, made them into these wondrous & magnificent creatures that have their own personality separate from the human side, yet at the same time they are one & the same! I love when in wolf mode, how the human side is there too, almost like the little voice in its head. "Sara the flirt and Sara the anxious were clearly at odds with themselves. Her wolf cocked a confused ear at the thought of more than one Sara roaming around." J. K. has me so consumed with her unique & PAWESOME wolves, with these FANGTASTIC characters and thoroughly entertaining storylines! I am so addicted that I cannot wait to read more FURTASTIC stories of this PAWMAZING and intriguing pack called the Black Mesa Wolves!

Hunting Wolf #3 - His wolf snorted a small whuffle. Rielle is nice. 5 GOLD WOLF STARS

Small, like a little snack. Maybe she's tasty, too. "Finally kissed you. What kind of an idiot have I been?” “The kind I wanted, it seems." WHAT A SHIFTACULAR STORY!! It had me howling, growling, panting, laughing, crying and oh so much more! I was waiting for Rielle's story ever since I met her and WOW! What a story it is!! Rielle & Caleb are too FANGTASTICALLY different but loveable characters. They weren't kidding when they said "opposites attract"!! Not only does it make for an oh-so-furry-hot romance, but for a freaking hilarious one as well! I was beyond surprised at how much they influenced each other without consciously (or at least to the human side!) realizing it. I personally think that having the story told from both Rielle's & Caleb's point of views was pure genius! But my favorite parts were when one 'scene' was played out by both povs, especially when Caleb did or said something totally Neanderthal-like. It truly gave a mostly hilarious look at it, first told from Rielle's pov, then switched & back-tracked a bit to then tell it from Caleb's! I lost count at how many times I wanted to smack him upside the head for his comments, but then when I found out why he said it - or didn't - I just wanted to hug him! After peeing myself laughing of course! I so furry, furry much love how the wolf and human sides communicate, behave, influence & entice the other half! I ABSO-FURRY-LUTELY love when the wolf gets his or her own personality! It completely enriches the story by adding a whole extra layer & point of view, which in turn captivates me even more! J.K. does this part so beautifully, so magically and so PAWFECTLY that I actually have a hard time remembering that this is a story and not real! Or is it 'just' a story?!? With J.K.'s FURNOMENAL writing skills and her ability to submerge you so deep into the story which in turn has you living the story with and as the characters, well that makes it so hard to tell where fiction leaves off and real life starts!! To me, this IS real life! I was so enthralled & mesmerised by this story that I read from beginning to end without stopping. I am so in awe of J.K.'s genuine gift and ability to almost instantly pull me so utterly deep into her stories that I am seeing, hearing, smelling & experiencing everything with, for and AS the characters. Being able to picture everything going on, the scenery, views, other characters, etc. further enriches the whole experience. Take all of these into account plus the ones I didn't mention, and you are transported from 'merely' reading a book to having a WOLFTASTIC adventure that you never want to end! Softening the blow of a furrific adventure having ended too soon, is the fact that this book is part of a SHIFTASTIC series where each book follows two people becoming a couple and getting their HEA, but also getting an over arcing storyline that runs over, under, with & through each book. An over arcing storyline that involves lives being threatened, as well as Pack life, laws & ways being challenged, well, that is a storyline that should get the attention it deserves…and it does!! J.K. has me wholly & completely swept away mind, body, soul & heart with her stories and this one is no different! I love every single part of it! That to me is the mark of a phenomenal author and one that has worked her way into my heart and will forever be one of my heroes whose books will entertain & sweep me away over & over again for many years to come!!

Solstice Wolf (bonus story!) - Happy winter solstice. 5 GOLD SNOWFLAKES

What a FURLICIOUSLY sweet & spicy tail!! It was one of those ones that make you nervous about how it will end, but WOW! it just made it that much more captivating!! I was immediately engrossed and lived this story right until the very end…without taking a break even to get a drink of water! I was constantly yelling, urging or berating both Lia & Connor in my head, and even caught myself saying it out loud a couple of times! Thank goodness I was at home alone at the time, although my dog was looking at me funny. LOL This one is slightly different than the other Black Mesa Wolves stories in that they already are a mated couple, but that didn't affect my love for it in any way. In fact, I ABSO-FURRY-LUTELY loved that part of it!! It’s not often you get to read a story of any length where they have already mated or married, so for me, that alone scored this baby a gold star! Yes, this is a bit shorter that most of the books we are used to in this series, but it sure didn't lack for story content or for an emotional connection to the characters or the story itself, or anything else for that matter!! In fact, J.K. gave this story the perfect amount of depth & enrichment making it feel like you just experienced a longer story. And the fact that I DID experience it, not just read it, speaks volumes! Which is all GRRRREAT to me!! Simply WOLFTASTIC!

top_screaming.text: BACK IN MAY 2000, I VISITED GRACELAND AND THEN TOOK A TOUR BUS TO BEALE ST. UPON BOARDING I ASKED THE TOUR GUIDE IF CHIPS MOMANS STUDIO WAS  NEARBY. HE GAVE ME A LOOK OF DISGUST INFERRING HE DIDN'T WANT TO TALK ABOUT HIM. THIS PEAKED BY CURIOSITY AS I LOVE TO READ BOOKS ABOUT THOSE IN THE MUSIC INDUSTRY, PRIMARILY CHIPS, WHOM I VIEW AS THE GREATEST PRODUCER EVER. I READ THE BOOK, ''THE MEMPHIS BOYS'' BUT ONLY COVERS THE AMERICAN SOUND STUDIOS YEARS 1967 TO 1972. I WANTED TO KNOW WHAT HAPPENED TO CHIPS AFTER WITH ONLY GLIMPSES OF THAT IN BRIEF ARTICLES. THUS I BOUGHT THIS BOOK. NOTHING PEAKED ANY INTEREST TIL I GOT TO PAGE 220, WHICH PICKS UP AFTER 1972 TIL HIS DEATH. BOOK GIVES INSIGHT INTO HIS LAGRANGE , GEORGIA MOVE, THEN ON TO NASHVILLE WHERE HE REKINDLED HIS SUCCESS IN COUNTRY MUSIC. I FOUND IT INSIGHTFUL ABOUT HOW THE SONG ''ALWAYS ON MY MIND ''WAS FIRST RECORDED WITH CHIPS AND MERLE HAGGARD BEFORE WILLIE NELSON MADE IT A MAJOR HIT. THE OFFER TO RETURN TO MEMPHIS FOR A NEW STUDIO NAMED ''FIVE ALARM'' FROM A CONVERTED FIREHOUSE AND THE RECORDING OF ''THE CLASS 0F 55'', THE RECORDINGS WITH WAYLON JENNINGS AND LATER WITH RINGO STAR PEAKED MY INTEREST . THE HIGHWAYMEN RECORDINGS ALSO INTERESTING. THE DEATH OF CHIPS FIRST WIFE,''LORRIE''( I BELIEVE HIS ONLY TRUE LOVE), HIS RELATIOSHIP WITH HIS DAUGHTER''MONIQUE'' AND SON ''CASEY''FROM SECOND MARRIAGE TO TONI WINE , AND HIS 3RD WIFE JANE ARE THINGS I NEVER KNEW. HIS DECLINING HEALTH AND DEATH AND BIPOLAR ISSUES TOO. BUT WHAT DISAPPOINTS ME IS ITS MOSTLY, ABOUT 90% THE AUTHORS OPINION AND 10% WORDS OF INTERVIEWS. BARELY ANYTHING FROM HIS HOUSE BAND, LITTLE ON HIS MOST FAMOUS RECORDINGS WITH ELVIS, LITTLE ABOUT THE BRENDA LEE LP ''MEMPHIS PORTRAIT ,''ONE OF CHIPS FAVORITE PRODUCTIONS AND BRENDA DECLINED TO AN INTERVIEW. IVE MET BRENDA WHO IS OPENLY WARM AND CONVERSATIONAL , MAKES ME WONDER WHY ? THEN HIS CONSTANT OPINIONS REGARDLESS OF FACTS. HE CLAIMS THE BEATLES CAUSED THE DEMISE OF HIS MEMPHIS SOUND SUCCESS ? WHAT ? THE BEATLES AS A GROUP POPULAR IN US FROM 1964 TO 1970. HIS MEMPHIS HEYDAY WAS FROM 1967-1972 ! HE STARTED AMERICAN SOUND STUDIOS AS AN ALTERNATIVE TO BRITISH MUSIC AND DECLINED REQUESTS FROM THE BEATLES AND OTHERS TO RECORD THERE AND HE HAS TREMENDOUS SUCCESS IN THEIR HEYDAY !!!!  HE SPENDS A LOT OF TIME TALKING ABOUT PETULA CLARKS RECORDING THERE. I HAVE BOTH OF HER LPS THERE. THE 1ST GREAT BUT NEITHER MADE A HUGE DENT IN MUSIC. YET HE SPENDS LITTLE TIME ON HIS MOST SUCCESSFUL STINT WITH ELVIS. NO MENTION OF WILSON PICKETT RECORDING THERE, BUT A LOT ON RINGO STARR WHO RECORDED WITH CHIPS IN MID TO LATE 80S. CHIPS WAS DESPERATE BY THAT TIME AS HE REALLY DIDNT CARE FOR BRITISH ROCK MUSIC. ONE THING FUNNY IS CHIPS , LIKE QUINCY JONES, OVERDUBBED RINGOS DRUMMING, LOL, WHILE THE AUTHOR PRAISES IT. CHIPS OVERDUBBED WITH GENE CHRISTMAN, AN OUTSTANDING DRUMMER. THEN RINGO SHAFTED HIM. LITTLE MENTION OF THE FILMED HIGHWAYMAN CONCERT CHIPS WAS INVOLVED WITH. BUT I DID LEARN WHY THAT TOUR GUIDE DISMISSED CHIPS. HE WAS FALSELY FOLLOWING THE MEDIA AND GOVERNMENT BUREACRACY THAT SLANDERED AND BETRAYED CHIPS, WRITTEN IN THIS BOOK ! SO ...WHAT WOULD CHIPS THINK ? I BELIEVE CHIPS WOULD APPRECIATE THE RESPECT AND DIG ITY HE WAS SHOWN BY THE AUTHOR. THE RECOGNITION OF HIS CHILDREN AND GENIUS. THE DEFENSE OF HIS INTEGRITY REGARDING HIS TIME IN MEMPHIS. BUT DISAPPOINTED IN THE AUTHORS COVERAGE OF HIS GREATEST MUSIC ACCOMPLISHMENTS . HE'D WONDER WHY NO MENTION OF RONNIE MILSHAP, HIS EARLIER SUCCESS WITH BOBBY WOMACK , HIS MUSICIANS GOING ON TO RECORD WITH DOBIE GRAY AND AGAIN WITH ELVIS. WHY THE AUTHOR SAID B J THOMAS LP ''EVERYBODY'S OUT OF TOWN ''HAD NO HITS WHEN ''I JUST CANT HELP BELIEVING'' IS ON THAT LP ! THIS BOOK GIVES INSIGHT INTO CHIPS LATER YEARS AFTER AMERICAN SOUND STUDIO, SO ID RECOMMEND BUYING A USED COPY TO READ OR AT A PUBLIC LIBRARY. A BETTER BOOK ABOUT CHIPS IS ''THE MEMPHIS BOYS'' BY ROBEN JONES , 5 STARS , WHERE HER OPINION IS IN THE FORWARD BUT THE STORY IS INSIGHTFUL FROM THE VIEWPOINT OF THOSE  WHO WERE ACTUALLY THERE !

THE NULLIFIER (THE CRIMINALS BOOK 1)
ERIN M. LEAF

THIS IS ONE POWERFULLY STRONG, “MUSCULARLY TESTOSTERONE” DRIVEN, STUNNINGLY STRAIGHTFORWARD, SEXY BOOK!
AND, OH, MY GODS! I’M OFFICIALLY BLOWN AWAY!

I LOVE HARD BOILED UNEMOTIONAL CRIMINALS WHO JUST DO THE JOB AND BE DONE WITH IT.
THATS IT. NOTHING MORE.
NO EMOTION. NO TURMOIL.
NO, NOTHING OVER OR ABOUT ANY OF IT. NO “I WONDER WHAT HE DID TO DESERVE THIS?” OR, “WOW! THAT WAS DRASTIC, HAVING HIM KILLED OUT IN PUBLIC, FOR ALL TO SEE!”
YUP! NO NOTHING! NO SECOND THOUGHTS — LET ALONE THERE WAS EVER A FIRST THOUGHT!
PERFECT! JUST ASTOUNDINGLY PERFECT!
I’VE BEEN WAITING FOR CHARACTERS AND A BOOK LIKE THIS FOR, WHAT FEELS LIKE, FOREVER!
THANK YOU, OHH SO MUCH, ERIN M. LEAF! THANK YOU!
THIS BOOK IS POWERFUL! BRUTAL! BRILLIANT! AND OH, SO FUN!
I DEVOURED EVERY LAST BIT OF IT!
I, UNASHAMEDLY, GOT ALL WORKED UP OVER THE ABSOLUTENESS OF IT’S UNAPOLOGETICALLY BRUTAL NATURE.
GODS! PLEASE, GIVE ME ANOTHER ONE!
OH! AND ANOTHER . . . AND ANOTHER . . .
FELIX AND NICK ARE THE GOOD GUYS AND THEY COULDN’T BE MORE RIGHT FOR EACH OTHER! THEY’RE BOTH HARD BOILED, RUTHLESS, MEN OF ACTION.
WITH WHAT THEY DO FOR A LIVING, THEY HAVE TO MAINTAIN THEMSELVES — THEIR BODIES, IN ORDER TO KEEP ON TOP OF ANY PHYSICAL ACTION THAT THEY MAY END UP BECOMING EMBROILED IN.
EACH ONE OF THESE MEN COULD SNAP THE OTHER ONE IN HALF.
THEY COULD DO SO WITH JUST THE SNAP OF THEIR WRISTS.
WITHOUT GIVING IT SO MUCH AS A SINGLE THOUGHT.
BUT, THEY DON’T.
AND, ALL THAT POWER AND EDGINESS, MAKES FOR SIMPLY GREAT BEDROOM SCENES!
I’M REALLY NOT INTO D/s SCENES — AT ALL!
HOWEVER, THESE BEDROOM SCENES ARE TOTALLY DIFFERENT.
THE DIFFERENCE IS FELIX AND NICK’S INHERENTLY DANGEROUS NATURES THAT ALSO, PLAY A PART IN THEIR LOVEMAKING.
AND, I’M NOT TALKING ABOUT THE GENERIC DANGER THAT IS OBVIOUS IN ANY D/s RELATIONSHIP.
I’M TALKING ABOUT HONEST-TO-GOODNESS, REAL LIFE-AND-DEATH DANGER, THAT THE TWO OF THEM NATURALLY BRING WITH THEM INTO ANY SITUATION!
THAT THIS AUTHOR THOUGHT TO INCORPORATE THAT VERY REAL, AND BRUTAL PART OF THESE MEN INTO THEIR LOVEMAKING, PLEASED ME TO NO END!
SHE COULD HAVE JUST DONE THE NORMAL D/s THING THAT YOU ALREADY KNEW WAS, SO OBVIOUSLY, GOING TO BE A BIG PART OF THEIR LOVEMAKING.
BUT, THANK THE GODS, SHE WAS •SOO•MUCH•SMARTER• THAN TO JUST LEAVE IT AT THAT!
SHE WAS TRUE TO HER CHARACTERS IN EVERY, AND I DO MEAN •EVERY•SINGLE•THING• THEY THOUGHT, SAID AND DID.
SHE NEVER ONCE STRAYED.
MANY TIMES, AUTHORS LOSE SITE OF THEIR CHARACTERS, FOR THE SAKE OF THE STORY.
OFTEN TIMES, A STORY YOU’RE READING, GETS SIDETRACKED SOMEWHERE ALONG THE LINE.
IT CAN TURN INTO SOMETHING COMPLETELY DIFFERENT FROM WHERE IT STARTED.
THAT’S ALWAYS SUCH A DISAPPOINTMENT.
NOT ERIN M. LEAF, THOUGH!
AND, GODS BLESS HER, FOR THAT!
YOU WILL ABSOLUTELY, POSITIVELY FLIP HEAD OVER HEELS FOR BOTH FELIX AND NICK IN “THE NULLIFIER” (THE CRIMINALS BOOK 1) BY ERIN M. LEAF!
THIS IS ONE POWERFULLY STRONG, “MUSCULARLY TESTOSTERONE” DRIVEN, STUNNINGLY STRAIGHTFORWARD, SEXY BOOK!
IF YOU’RE INTO CHARACTERS THAT ARE HONEST ABOUT THEMSELVES WITH NO REGRETS AND NO REMORSE . . .
IF YOU’RE INTO CHARACTERS THAT ARE HONEST TO GOODNESS BAD!TO!THE!BONE! (WITH THE CRIMINALS) . . .
IF YOU’RE INTO CHARACTERS THAT ARE BRUTAL WHEN CALLED FOR, COMPASSIONATE WHEN NEEDED AND GIVE THEIR UNDIVIDED “ALL” TO EVERY THING THEY DO THEN . . .
THESE CHARACTERS, THIS BOOK, THIS SERIES AND THIS AUTHOR ARE DEFINITELY, HANDS-DOWN THE ONES FOR YOU!
YOU WILL ENJOY, AND DEVOUR, EVERY LAST CRUMB ERIN M. LEAF FEEDS YOU IN “THE NULLIFIER” AND STILL BE STARVED FOR MORE!

I’M HUNGRY ERIN . . . PLEASE, FEED ME!

🌷MTULIPK🌷

PS
I WOULD DIE TO SEE FELIX AND NICK ON A JOB TOGETHER.
I KNOW IT WOULD MOST LIKELY BE NICK’S JOB WITH FELIX AS HIS PARTNER AND/OR BACK-UP AND “DEADLY” BODYGUARD!
BUT, OH, HOW ABOUT AT LEAST ONE LAST, VERY IMPORTANT, JOB THAT WOULD MEAN A LOT TO FELIX TO BE ABLE TO FINALLY PUT TO REST?
MAYBE, FROM A JOB THAT HAD MORE THAN ONE ASPECT TO IT BUT, WASN’T FOR HIM TO TAKE CARE OF?
ONE HE’D ORIGINALLY WANTED TO CLEAN-UP EVERY LOOSE END ON BUT, WASN’T ALLOWED TO BECAUSE THAT PART OF IT WASN’T HIS CONTRACT? AND SO, BEING THE PRO THAT HE IS, HE LET IT GO?
BUT OH, HOW HIS HEART TRULY WANTS TO FINISH WHAT WAS STARTED BECAUSE SOMEHOW, IT WAS PERSONAL TO HIM?
I SHOULDN’T BOX MYSELF IN . . . BECAUSE, I TRULY WOULD LOVE TO SEE NOT JUST ONE MORE — BUT •MANY•MORE• OF FELIX’S JOBS, WITH NICK IN TOW — AND, VISE-VERSA!
YES•MANY•MORE•INDEED!

THANK YOU, FOR FEEDING MY BOOK “SOUL,” ERIN.
TRULY, I “NEEDED” THIS BOOK!

top_screaming.text:
A PINCH OF SALT (THREE SISTERS CATERING #1) BY BETHANY LOPEZ
REVIEW BY THERESA ESTERLINE
STARS: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

WHAT A HEARTWARMING STORY!!

WHO DOESN'T LOVE A HAPPY ENDING! THOUGH I WASN'T SURE IT WAS IN THE CARDS FOR THESE TWO. WITH THE EXCEPTION OF THE ONE BAD GUY (OR SHOULD I SAY GAL) IN THIS STORY EVERYONE IS GENERALLY NICE AND POLITE TO THE OTHER. YES THERE ARE TANTRUMS, BUT I'M TALKING ABOUT THE ARE YOU KIDDING ME TYPE OF EVIL. GOOD TO KNOW THERE ARE STILL STORIES OUT THERE WHERE MOST PEOPLE ARE GOOD AND TREAT EACH OTHER KIND. I HOPE YOU ENJOY THIS FUN AND QUIRKY STORY ABOUT THREE SISTERS!! AND NOW A BIT ABOUT THE STORY...

MILLIE AND HER SISTERS ARE RUNNING A SUCCESSFUL CATERING BUSINESS WITH A SMALL STOREFRONT. JACKSON HAS BEEN SEPARATED FROM HIS WIFE, WHO UP AND LEFT HIM ADD THEIR DAUGHTER TO FIND HERSELF, FOR A YEAR. NOW HE HAS JUST DAYS TO PLAN THE PERFECT 9 YEAR OLD BIRTHDAY TEA PARTY. ONLY ONE PROBLEM... HE KNOWS NOTHING ABOUT TEA PARTIES. MILLIE COMES TO THE RESCUE AND MAY END UP GROWING MORE THAN HER BUSINESS!!

FAVORITE PASSAGES:
- I WAS BEGINNING TO WONDER WHAT THE HELL WAS WRONG WITH THIS GUY. THERE HAD TO BE SOMETHING. NO ONE WAS THIS PERFECT. MAYBE HE PICKS HIS NOSE OR BITES HIS TOENAILS . . .
- “MY DADDY SAYS, EITHER YOU LOVE SOMEONE OR YOU DON’T. I HEARD HIM IN CLASS ONE TIME, AND HE SAID THE CHARACTERS IN HIS BOOKS SPEND SO MUCH TIME BEING OB-OB . . . WHAT’S THE WORD FOR DUMB?” SHE ASKED. MRS. HEELER AND I BOTH SAID, “OBTUSE.”

NOTE: I WAS GIVEN A FREE COPY AND VOLUNTARILY CHOSE TO REVIEW THIS BOOK.

A TOUCH OF CINNAMON (THREE SISTERS CATERING #2) BY BETHANY LOPEZ
REVIEW BY THERESA ESTERLINE
STARS: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

WILL HER FIRST LOVE BE HER LAST?

A LOVELY ROMANTIC STANDALONE WITH A LITTLE SUSPENSE. SET IN A BEAUTIFUL SMALL TOWN WITH THRIVING SHOPS ON MAIN STREET. WE GET TO READ ABOUT THE NEXT STEPS FOR MILLIE AND JACKSON FROM BOOK ONE, BUT NO WORRIES, YOU WILL NOT GET LOST IF YOU READ THIS FIRST. BUT THE BEST PART IS LEARNING WHAT MADE NATASHA AND JERICHO HATE EACH OTHER. SOME SAY HATE IS REALLY CLOSE TO LOVE. AND NOW A BIT ABOUT THE STORY...

NATASHA AND JERICHO MET IN COLLEGE AND FELL HEAD FIRST IN LOVE. EVERY MOMENT NOT SPENT IN CLASS OR STUDYING WAS WITH EACH OTHER. THEY TALKED ABOUT EVERYTHING: PAST, PRESENT, AND FUTURE. BUT THEN EARLY ONE MORNING, RIGHT BEFORE THEIR MORNING COFFEE DATE, NATASHA GOT A CALL TO COME HOME, FAMILY EMERGENCY. SHE KNEW SHE COULDN'T LEAVE HIM UNLESS SHE DID IT COLD TURKEY. SO OFF SHE WENT. A YEAR LATER THEY ARE REUNITED WHEN HE OPENS A RESTAURANT ACROSS THE STREET FROM HER FAMILY BUSINESS. IT IS PURE HATRED AT FIRST. BUT WILL LOVE FIND ITS WAY BACK TO THEM???

FAVORITE PASSAGES:
- I WAS CAPTIVATED , MESMERIZED, STARING UP AT HIM AS HE GRINNED SLIGHTLY DOWN AT ME.
- MY HEART CRUMBLED AND I FELT PAIN AND ANGER RADIATING THROUGH ME.

NOTE: I WAS GIVEN A FREE COPY AND VOLUNTARILY CHOSE TO REVIEW THIS BOOK.

A SPLASH OF VANILLA (THREE SISTERS CATERING #3) BY BETHANY LOPEZ
REVIEW BY THERESA ESTERLINE
STARS: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

JUST THE SPLASH THEY NEEDED!

THE LAST HAPPY ENDING FOR THE THREE SISTERS! YOU'LL GET TO HEAR AND WITNESS MILLIE AND TASHA'S HAPPY EVER AFTER FROM DRU AND MICK'S PERSPECTIVE. THIS ONE IS DIRECT AND TO THE POINT AND I LOVED IT! THERE IS A LITTLE MYSTERY AND SOME DRAMA TOO. PLUS A FEW MYSTERY CHARACTERS THAT I'M HOPING WILL GET THEIR OWN SERIES. AND NOW A BIT ABOUT THE STORY...

DRU WAS DRAWN THE MICK FROM THE MOMENT THEY MET. UNFORTUNATELY HE HAD A NO DATING CLIENTS RULE AND SHE HAS HIRED HIM TO FIND HER DEAD BEAT DAD. MICK WAS KICKING HIMSELF EVERYDAY FOR HIS RULES AND MAY HAVE EVEN BENT THEM A TIME OR TWO. ONCE THE CASE IS SOLVED IT SHOULD BE SMOOTH SAILING, RIGHT?

FAVORITE PASSAGES:
- HOW COME MEN COULD DO THAT ? BUY ONE SUIT TO WEAR TO EVERY EVENT, AND GET NO FLACK, WHILE IF WOMEN GOT CAUGHT WEARING THE SAME DRESS REPEATEDLY, IT WAS LIKE THERE WAS SOMETHING WRONG WITH HER?
- “WANNA EAT AT THE TABLE, OR WATCH SOMETHING ON TV?” HE ASKED. ... “TV,” I REPLIED. “WE CAN SIT AT THE TABLE FOR BREAKFAST.” I DIDN’T BOTHER HIDING MY GRIN AS I TOOK THE PLATE AND SASHAYED OUT OF THE ROOM, IGNORING THE SHOCK ON MICK’S FACE.
- “HAVE YOU EVER TRIED BEN & JERRY’S?” “NO, BUT I’VE HAD ICE CREAM.” “IT’S NOT THE SAME THING, YOU’LL SEE,” I PROMISED. “WE’LL POP YOUR CHERRY GARCIA TONIGHT.”

NOTE: I WAS GIVEN A FREE COPY AND VOLUNTARILY CHOSE TO REVIEW THIS BOOK.

top_screaming.text:
FIGHTING FOR WANT YOU WANT DESPITE THE HARDSHIPS YOU HAVE FACED IS DEFINITELY THE OVER-ARCHING THEME IN THIS NOVEL. BOTH JESS AND JUSTIN HAVE BEEN HIT HARD BY WHAT LIFE HAS DECIDED TO THROW AT THEM AND YET THEY KEEP ON GOING AFTER WHAT THEY WANT OR DOING WHAT THEY ARE PASSIONATE ABOUT. YOU LEARN VERY EARLY ON JUST HOW STRONG AND DETERMINED JESS HAD TO BE ONCE HER PARENTS ABANDONED HER AND SHE WAS PUT IN THE SYSTEM. SHE GOT INTO COLLEGE WHERE HER FOCUS NOW WENT TO FINISHING AND EARNING HER DEGREE IN THE HOPES OF BECOMING A TEACHER AFTERWARDS. THAT FOCUS LEADS HER TO HER INTERNSHIP AT THE COMMUNITY CENTER WHERE SHE CROSSES PATHS WITH JUSTIN, THE BASKETBALL COACH, AND IN THAT MOMENT HER PLAN FOR THE FUTURE SHIFTS DRAMATICALLY.

THOUGH YOU DO NOT REALIZE THE DEGREE OF HARDSHIPS JUSTIN HAS HAD TO FACE UNTIL IT IS REVEALED IN THE NOVEL WHICH, WAS A COMPLETE SHOCK TO ME AND DEFINITELY BROUGHT AN UNEXPECTED ELEMENT TO THE STORY THAT I QUICKLY EMBRACED, HE IS ALSO FIGHTING TO MAINTAIN THE NORMALCY OF HIS LIFE AFTER WHAT HAS HAPPENED. OF COURSE THAT NORMALCY IS SHATTERED ONCE HE AND JESS MEET AND SLOWLY START TO GET CLOSE TO ONE ANOTHER. HIS FEARS AND INSECURITIES OF HOW HE WILL BE PERCEIVED BY JESS WHEN SHE FINDS OUT THE EXTENT OF HIS INJURIES LEADS HIM TO FIRST FIGHT AGAINST HIS FEELINGS FOR HER. THAT OF COURSE IS A LOST CAUSE AS THE TWO BECOME CLOSER AND CLOSER, RESULTING IN THEM ACCEPTING WHAT HAS HAPPENED TO EACH ONE ANOTHER IN THEIR PASTS AS WELL AS BETWEEN THEM AS THE NOVEL PROGRESSES. NEVER GIVING UP THE FIGHT FOR ONE ANOTHER AFTER ALL THE OBSTACLES AND ISSUES THAT ARISE, JESS AND JUSTIN ARE FINALLY ABLE TO BE TOGETHER, THE “US” THEY WERE FROM THE VERY BEGINNING.

STEPPING INTO JESS’S SHOES AND TAKING IN THE FULL EXTENT OF WHAT HAPPENED TO HER WHEN SHE WAS A TEENAGER ALLOWS YOU TO SEE JUST HOW STRONG SHE IS. HER PARENTS ABANDONED HER WHEN SHE WAS 14, THEY JUST LEFT AND WENT BACK TO CROATIA NEGLECTING HER AND HER BROTHER MIKE BECAUSE THEY SAW THEM AS BURDENS. THAT AND THE FACT THAT AFTERWARDS, JESS WAS PUT IN THE FOSTER SYSTEM WHERE SHE LIVED IN A GROUP HOME UNTIL SHE MOVED INTO THE DORMS FOR COLLEGE IS UNBELIEVABLE BECAUSE DESPITE THAT HARDSHIP JESS WAS STILL ABLE TO MOVE FORWARD INTO COLLEGE WHERE HER FOCUS WAS TURNED TOWARDS GETTING HER DEGREE. HER DETERMINATION AND FORTITUDE IS SO ADMIRABLE YOU COULDN’T HELP BUT RALLY BEHIND JESS HOPING SHE WOULD FINALLY GET WHAT SHE WANTED AFTER ALL SHE HAS BEEN THROUGH.

WITH THE DEGREE OF STRUGGLES AND OBSTACLES THAT BOTH JESS AND JUSTIN HAVE FACED IT IS NOT SURPRISING TO FIND THAT THIS NOVEL IS DEFINITELY FULL OF EMOTIONS. JESS AND JUSTIN’S ROMANCE BEGINS SLOWLY AND IS ADORABLE TO READ BUT THEIR RELATIONSHIP IS NOT IMMUNE TO CERTAIN FACTORS THAT LEAD TO IT HIT A FEW BUMPS, SOME LARGER THAN OTHERS, ALONG THE WAY. *SPOILERS* JUSTIN’S INJURIES AND HOW HE IS A DOUBLE AMPUTEE, HAVING LOST BOTH HIS LEGS FROM BELOW THE KNEE DUE TO AN IED WHEN HE WAS IN AFGHANISTAN, DEFINITELY KICKS THINGS UP A NOTCH ON THE EMOTIONAL SCALE. NOT ONLY DID IT COMPLETELY SURPRISE ME BUT IT ALSO ALLOWED ME TO LOOK PAST JUSTIN AS SOMEONE WHO HAS A DISABILITY AND SEE HIM HOW JESS SAW HIM FROM THE VERY BEGINNING. BY REVEALING THE EXTENT OF HIS INJURIES A LITTLE LATER IN THE NOVEL, YOU ARE ABLE SEE HIM AS THIS GUY WHO IS SINCERE AND CARING TOWARDS JESS AND NOT AS SOMEONE WHO LOST HIS LEGS WHILE OVERSEAS IN AFGHANISTAN. I REALLY APPRECIATED THAT REVEAL BECAUSE IT DEFINITELY ALLOWED ME TO LOOK PAST WHAT HAS HAPPENED TO JUSTIN AND FOCUS MORE ON HIS RELATIONSHIP WITH JESS.

DESPITE ALL THIS, THERE WERE A FEW THINGS WITH THIS BOOK THAT DID NOT SIT RIGHT WITH ME. THE PACING OF THE NOVEL FELT A LITTLE OFF TO ME ESPECIALLY WHEN AT TIMES IT SEEMED LIKE THINGS HAPPENED JUST A LITTLE TOO FAST BETWEEN JESS AND JUSTIN IN REGARDS TO THE UNFOLDING OF THEIR RELATIONSHIP. ALSO, THOUGH I AM GLAD OF HOW JUSTIN’S CHARACTER TURNED OUT AT THE END OF THE NOVEL, HIS ISSUES AND INSECURITIES REARED THEIR UGLY HEAD A FEW TOO MANY TIMES TO THE POINT THAT I FOUND HIM TO BE A LITTLE ANNOYING AND JUST A TAD TOO PROTECTIVE OF JESS.

top_screaming.text:
NOW THIS MAY SOUND STRANGE TO SOME PEOPLE BUT THE WAY GRAYSON AND PARKER BEGAN THEIR RELATIONSHIP, EMAILING EACH OTHER BACK AND FORTH ABOUT THE DRAWINGS THAT GRAYSON HAD COME UP WITH FOR PARKER’S FOUNDATION WHILE ALSO GETTING TO KNOW ONE ANOTHER AND THEREFORE DEVELOPING FEELINGS FOR ONE ANOTHER IS EXACTLY HOW I PICTURED TWO PEOPLE FALLING FOR EACH OTHER WHEN I WAS YOUNGER. TRUTH BE TOLD I STILL THINK THAT, AND EVEN THOUGH THE LONG DISTANCE WAS OBVIOUSLY AN OBSTACLE, THERE IS SOMETHING ABOUT THEM LEARNING ABOUT ONE ANOTHER THROUGH THE EMAILS THEY SENT TO ONE ANOTHER THAT SOUNDS INCREDIBLY ROMANTIC. OF COURSE, BOTH TRIED TO REMAIN PROFESSIONAL BUT THAT SOON FELL AT THE WAYSIDE AS BOTH BEGAN TO FALL FOR ONE ANOTHER DESPITE THE FACT THAT THEY DID NOT KNOW IF THESE FEELINGS THAT WERE FORMING WOULD BE RECIPROCATE WHEN THEY PLANNED ON MEETING IN PERSON.

UNFORTUNATELY, LIFE GOT IN THE WAY AS TRAGEDY STRUCK AND PARKER UNEXPECTEDLY LOST THE ONE PERSON IN THIS WORLD THAT WAS HER FAMILY, BERT STEIN. PARKER GREW UP IN FOSTER CARE, SHUFFLING FROM HOUSE TO HOUSE BEFORE SHE MET BERT WHO BECAME NOT ONLY HER FAMILY BUT HELPED HER LAUNCH HER CAREER AS AN ACTRESS. THEREFORE, WHEN PARKER LEARNED THAT HE PASSED AWAY WHILE SHOOTING A FILM, THE ONLY APPROPRIATE THING FOR HER TO DO IN ORDER TO DEAL WITH HER GRIEF WAS TO RETURN TO WELLFLEET AND BASICALLY BECOME A HERMIT AS SHE SHUT OUT THE REST OF THE WORLD AND GRAYSON ALONG WITH IT. IT IS AFTER TWO WEEKS OF RADIO SILENCE THAT FATE DECIDED TO STEP IN AS PARKER AND GRAYSON FINALLY MEET. TO SAY THAT THE MEETING IS UNPROFESSIONAL IS AN UNDERSTATEMENT AS GRAYSON HAPPENS UPON PARKER WHO IS HOLED UP IN HER HOUSE AFTER BELIEVING THAT SOMEONE HAS BROKEN IN. INSTEAD HE FINDS PARKER WHO HAS DECIDED THAT TEQUILA, CANDY, AND HORROR MOVIES ARE EXACTLY WHAT YOU NEED WHEN DEALING WITH THE DEATH OF THE ONLY FAMILY YOU EVER HAD. IT IS THROUGH THIS HILARIOUSLY ADORABLE FIRST SCENE THAT YOU ARE ABLE TO SEE THE SPARK BETWEEN THESE TWO DESPITE ONLY HAVING A RELATIONSHIP VIA EMAIL FOR THE LAST TEN MONTHS.

THE DOWNSIDE TO HAVING THEIR RELATIONSHIP BE OVER EMAIL FOR THE FIRST TEN MONTHS IS THAT WE DID NOT SEE THE BEGINNINGS OF THEIR RELATIONSHIP UNFOLD SO WHEN THEY DO MEET AND BEGIN TO GET TOGETHER IT FEELS RATHER FAST. I HAD TO REMIND MYSELF SEVERAL TIMES OF THEIR PREVIOUS EMAIL CORRESPONDENCE SO AS TO NOT JUST IMMEDIATELY WRITE THIS OFF AS INSTA-LOVE. IT IS BECAUSE OF THIS THAT MY INVESTMENT IN THEIR RELATIONSHIP TOOK A LITTLE BIT OF TIME BUT IT WAS WELL WORTH IT BECAUSE GRAYSON AND PARKER DID NOT LET ME DOWN. I WAS ABLE TO CONNECT WITH PARKER A LOT FASTER THAN WITH GRAYSON, BUT AFTER GRAYSON STANDS UP TO ABE, BERT’S BROTHER, WHO PARKER TRIES TO RECONCILE WITH I SOON BEGAN TO SWOON. THE SWOONING CONTINUED AS THINGS STARTED TO HEAT UP BETWEEN GRAYSON AND PARKER WHOSE PASSION FOR ONE ANOTHER CAME WITH A SIDE OF CUTENESS. WHILE I OBVIOUSLY BELIEVED THEY WERE ATTRACTED TO ONE ANOTHER, THEIR MORE STEAMY MOMENTS HAD AN AIR OF TAMENESS TO THEM ALLOWING FOR THE CUTENESS FACTOR TO COME THROUGH. IT WAS A SMALL MOMENT BETWEEN GRAYSON AND PARKER WHEN GRAYSON WAS WATCHING PARKER AS SHE READ THE SCRIPT SHE HAD RECEIVED FOR A ROM-COM THAT GOT ME HOOK, LINE, AND SINKER BECAUSE IT IS EXACTLY THE THING I HOPE FOR WHEN I FIND THE PERSON I AM GOING TO FALL IN LOVE WITH. ADD IN THE FACT THAT IT TAKES PLACE ON CAPE COD AND YOU HAVE ONE HAPPY READER:).

IF YOU ARE LOOKING FOR A SWOON-WORTHY ROMANCE THAT IS BOTH REALISTIC AND ADORABLY CUTE, THEN YOU NEED TO PICK UP SEASIDE LOVERS AND THEN MAKE YOUR WAY THROUGH THE REST OF MELISSA FOSTER’S BOOKS. YOU WILL NOT REGRET IT, I PROMISE!!
top_screaming.title: Swoon-worthy romance

top_screaming.text:
I AM ADDING MY REVIEW FOR BOOK ONE AND BOOK TWO BECAUSE FOR SOME REASON WHEN YOU PULL BOOK TWO UP IT IS THE SAME REVIEWS FROM BOOK ONE. SO I COMBINED BUT SEPERATED BOTH BOOKS.

@@@@@@@RUNNING OUT OF TIME BOOK ONE@@@@@@@

I GAVE THIS BOOK 3 STARS INSTEAD OF 5 BECAUSE I THINK THE STORY SHOULD HAVE BEEN TOLD IN ONE BOOK.
2. I THINK THE AUTHOR SHOULD HAVE GIVEN US A LITTLE KARMA IN THIS BOOK ON CRAIG

I SEE THIS BOOK HAS A SEQUEL AND IT COST $15.00 BUT THIS STORY IS NOT GOOD ENOUGH TO PAY $15.00. THAT’S JUST MY OPINION. I GOT THE SEQUEL FOR FREE AND THAT IS THE ONLY REASON I'M READING IT.

SPARKLE REALLY GOT ON MY LAST NERVE BEING SO DARN NAÏVE. I WAS LIKE GIRL, COME ON NOW. WHATEVER CRAIG DO TO HER I WILL NOT FEEL SORRY FOR HER. SHE SAW ALL THE SIGNS.

I WAS REALLY MAD AT DIAMOND BECAUSE SHE TOLD HER DAD WHAT WAS GOING ON AND I KNOW HE NEEDED TO KNOW BUT TELLING HIM WAS REALLY A CATCH 22 BECAUSE THAT WHOLE SCENE COULD HAVE WENT TOTALLY ANOTHER WAY AND MYRON COULD HAVE GOTTEN KILLED OR SENT TO JAIL FOR 20 YEARS. I’M JUST SAYING.

CRAIG WAS A FOOL AND A HALF. THAT MAN WAS OFF THE CHAIN AND I AM REALLY MAD THAT HE DIDN’T GET WHAT HE DESERVED IN THIS BOOK.

THERE WERE ERRORS IN THIS BOOK BUT THE ONE I COULD NOT FORGIVE AND WHAT MADE THIS BOOK LOSE POINTS IS WHEN THE AUTHOR GOT THE CHARACTERS MIXED UP. ON PAGE 86 HE CALLED BREONNA SPARKLE.

I WOULD SUGGEST THIS BOOK ONLY IF YOU ARE WILLING TO PAY $15.00 FOR THE SEQUEL BECAUSE YOU WILL BE LEFT HANGING.

SIGNED: NO SEQUEL FOR ME.

@@@@@@@@RUNNING OUT OF TIME BOOK 2 REVIEW@@@@@@@@@@

I GAVE THIS BOOK 2 STARS INSTEAD OF 5 BECAUSE I WAS REALLY DISAPPPOINTED IN THIS SEQUEL. HERE IS JUST SOME OF THE REASONS. I WILL TALK IN CODE BECAUSE I DON’T WANT TO GIVE A SPOILER ALERT.
1. FIRST THING I WANT TO KNOW IS HOW DID BREONNA GET PREGNANT AND HAVE A BABY? IN BOOK ONE SHE HAD A HYSTERECTOMY, AND NOT JUST A HYSTERECTOMY BUT A COMPLETE HYSTERECTOMY.
2. WHEN CHAD DOWNLOADED THE APP TO FIND A FRIEND AND HE WAS ABLE TO LOCATE CRAIG BY USING THAT APP. THE ONLY WAY YOU CAN LOCATE A FRIEND BY USING THAT APP IS THE FRIEND WHO YOU ARE TRYING TO LOCATE HAS TO ACCEPT YOUR REQUEST. YOU CAN’T JUST LOCATE WHOEVER YOU WANT TO WITHOUT PERMISSION.
3. THE AUTHOR KEPT SAYING CRAIG AND CHAD WERE BEST FRIENDS IN BOTH BOOKS, BUT IN NEITHER BOOK, DID THEY HAVE ANY BONDING TIME. THEY NEVER HUNG OUT OR NOTHING. I NEVER FELT THE CONNECTION.
4. AFTER SPARKLE HAD HER BABY WHY DIDN’T SHE GO HOME WITH HER PARENTS INSTEAD OF HER SISTER’S HOUSE AND AFTER SHE LEFT THE HOSPITAL THE MOTHER NOR THE FATHER CAME TO HER SISTER’S HOUSE TO SEE THE BABY OR HELP WITH THE BABY. I AM ONLY MAKING A BIG DEAL OUT OF THIS BECAUSE THE AUTHOR MADE IT A POINT TO SHOW HOW CLOSE THIS FAMILY BOND WAS.
5. WITH ALL THE CHARGES CRAIG HAD ON HIM HOW DID HE GET BAIL PLUS THEY JUST GIVE HIM 25 YEARS.
6. WHEN CRAIG WENT TO THE EMERGENCY ROOM FOR HIS BURN, I’M NOT UNDERSTANDING WHY THE E.R DOCTOR WOULD TELL HIM TO COME TO HIS OFFICE FOR FOLLOWUP. I WORK IN HEALTHCARE AND I HAVE NEVER SEEN WHERE THE E.R DOCTOR TELL THE PATIENT TO COME TO HIS OFFICE FOR A FOLLOWUP. THE DOCTOR WOULD HAVE TOLD CRAIG TO FOLLOW-UP WITH HIS PRIMARY CARE DOCTOR.
THAT’S JUST SOME OF THE STUFF.

I AM SO MAD THE AUTHOR DID THAT TO MYRON. EVEN IF SOMETHING HAD HAPPENED, HE SHOULD HAVE COME OUT OF THE DEAL WITH A BETTER OUTCOME.
I THINK THE AUTHOR SHOULD HAVE GIVEN US SOME CLARITY ON ALONDRA’S SITUATION. I WANTED TO KNOW WHAT HER REACTION WAS WHEN THE CAVALRY CAME. I ALSO WANTED TO KNOW HER MOTHER’S REACTION WHEN SHE FOUND OUT ABOUT ALONDRA. I KNOW SHE WASN’T SURPISED THAT MUCH ABOUT CRAIG BUT I WOULD HAVE LIKED TO HAVE KNOWN HER REACTION TO HIM WHEN SHE FOUND OUT EVERYTHING. I ALSO WANTED TO KNOW WHAT TYPE OF GUY BROCK WAS. WAS HE ANYTHING LIKE HIS SISTER AND BROTHER? HE WAS A MYSTERY.

I DON’T THINK CRAIG GOT WHAT HE DESERVED.

ONE THING IN THIS BOOK I WAS SO HAPPY ABOUT IS SPARKLE DID NOT NAME HER BABY ROSALEE!!!!!

I GUESS I WOULD SUGGEST THIS BOOK IF YOU READ BOOK ONE.

SIGNED: I SHOULD HAVE KEPT RUNNING FROM THIS BOOK!!!

NEED YOU NOW. BY: MIKA JOLIE *****5*****
LILY AND ADAM ARE BOTH VERY STUBBORN ABOUT BEING IN CONTROL OF THEIR FEELINGS. THEY SOON REALIZE THEY HAVE A LOT OF PASSION AND DESIRE FOR EACH OTHER. THEIR NEED TO BE IN CONTROL COULD WRECK THEM BEFORE THEY GET STARTED. TOGETHER THEY ARE STRONG. SEPARATE THEY ARE DEPRESSED AND LONELY. LIFE ALWAYS HAS A FUNNY WAY TO KNOCK YOU DOWN. SOMETIMES IT IS NOT THE RIGHT TIME AND PLACE FOR LOVE TO TAKE FLIGHT. SOMETIMES YOU HAVE TO WALK AWAY NO MATTER HOW PAINFUL IT WILL BE. IF IT IS MEANT TO BE YOU WILL FIND YOUR WAY BACK TO EACH OTHER.
ADAM HAD A ROUGH CHILDHOOD THAT SHAPED HIS VIEWS ON LOVE AND BEING IN LOVE. AS A RACER HE LIKES LIVING IN THE FAST LANE. HE HAS A DARK PAST AND THAT MAKES IT DIFFICULT TO LET ANYONE NEAR HIS HEART.
LILY IS A SCHOOL TEACHER WHO HAD HER HEART RIPPED OUT BY HER CHEATING EX. SHE MEETS ADAM AND THEY DECIDE TO HOOK UP WHENEVER HE IS IN TOWN WHICH WORKS FINE FOR BOTH OF THEM SINCE NEITHER ONE IS LOOKING FOR ANYTHING SERIES. BUT LILY WANTS WHAT SHE THOUGHT SHE WOULD NEVER HAVE AGAIN, LOVE. SHE REALIZES SHE IS IN LOVE WITH ADAM AND FINDS HERSELF PREGNANT.WHEN SHE TELLS ADAM HE DEMANDS THAT SHE MARRY HIM WHICH MAKES HER FURIOUS WITH HIM AND DOES NOT TAKE KINDLY TO HIS DEMANDS. WHEN HER THREE OOLDER PROTECTIVE BROTHERS FIND OIT THEY START CLOSING THE RANKS AROUND HER AND BARK ORDERS THEMSELVES. THEN SHE FINDS OUT HER CHEATING EX NATE WANTS BACK WITH HER. THEY ARE MAKING HER CRAZY AND SHE IS OUT TO PROVE TO THEM SHE IS NOT SOME PRIZE HEFER THAT NEEDS TO BE DROPPED IN.
MIKA JOLIE ALWAYS WRITES SUCH GOOD BOOKS. NEED YOU NOW IS A MUST READ.

top_screaming.text:
THIS WAS SUCH AN INTRIGUING BOOK. THE DYNAMICS OF THREE SISTERS ALL KEEPING SECRETS FROM ONE ANOTHER. A MOTHER WHO IS GETTING MARRIED AFTER BEING A WIDOW FOR SO LONG. AND A SWEET OLD LADY WHO OWNS THE HOTEL IN WHICH THE WEDDING IS BEING HELD WHO TRIED TO BRING ONE OF THE SISTERS AND THE MOTHER CLOSER. I LOVED THIS BOOK FOR MANY REASON. THERE WAS HUMOR. THE SHOULD I OR SHOULDNT I REVEL MY TRUE SELF DYNAMIC. AND MOST OF ALL I IDENTIFIED WITH ALL THREE SISTERS IN SOME SMALL WAY.

I'LL START WITH THE OLDEST RACHEL. SHE IS A DIVORCED MOTHER OF AN 11 YEAR OLD SON. HER EX HUSBAND CHEATED ON HER AND WAS NOT THE BEST OF HUSBANDS WHERE DOING THINGS AROUND THE HOUSE WERE CONCERNED. HE WOULD RATHER GO OFF AND BE WITH HIS FRIENDS. THEY MARRIED YOUNG AND BECAME PARENTS VERY QUICK AFTER THAT. BUT AFTER 2 YEARS OF BEING DIVORCED HE IS TRYING TO PROVE HIMSELF TO HER. RACHEL DOESN'T KNOW WHETHER TO TRUST HIM OR NOT. SHE WANTS TO BUT IS AFRAID OF BEING HURT AGAIN. THEN THER IS THE FACT THAT SHE HAS ALWAYS BEEN THE ONE TO DO EVERYTHING EVER SINCE SHE WAS 9 AND HER DAD PASSED AWAY. SHE IS AFRAID TO RELINQUISH CONTROL. I CAN IDENTIFY WITH HER BEING THAT SHE IS A DIVORCED MOM. ALTHOUGH I HAVE 2 KIDS NOT ONE AND JUST TO ADD THAT MY SON ACTUALLY IS 11. SO I KNOW HOW HARD IT IS TO BE A WORKING MOM.

SIENNA IS THE MORE LAID BACK SISTER. SHE WORKS FOR AN ABUSED WOMANS SHELTER AND SHE LOVED WHAT SHE DOES. SHE HAS BEEN ENGAGED TWICE AND BOTH HAVE BEEN BROKEN OFF. THE FIRST ONE THEY WERE JUST TOO YOUNG AND SHE REMAIN BEST FRIENDS WITH HIM. THE SECOND ONE WAS JUST AN IDIOT FOR BREAKING IT OFF WITH HER. SO WHEN HER CURRENT BOYFRIEND WHOM SHE DOESNT KNOW IF SHE EVEN WANTS TO CONTINUE DATING POPS THE QUESTION AT HER MOTHERS ENGAGMENT PARTY SHE FEELS LIKE A DEER CAUGHT IN THE HEADLIGHTS AND SHE SAYS YES. WITH SIENNA IT ISNT THAT SHE DOESNT WANT TO SETTLE DOWN. SHE JUST DOESNT WANT TO SETTLE. SHE WANTS TO MAKE SURE SHE GETS ITS RIGHT. SHE DOESNT HAVE A CLOSE RELATIONSHIP WITH HER SISTERS EITHER AND SHE WANTS THAT TO CHANGE AS WELL. I IDENTIFY WITH HER FOR THE REASON OF NOT BEING CLOSE TO HER SIBLING BUT WISHING I WAS. PLUS I AM MORE OF A LAID BACK KIND OF PERSON THAN ANYTHING ELSE.

THEN THERE IS COURTNEY. SHE IS THE BABY. SHE NEVER FINSIHED HIGH SCHOOL. NEVER REALLY HAD A REAL BOYFIRNED. AND IS REALLY ONLY CLOSE TO RACHEL. AND EVEN BEING CLOSE TO HER ONE SISTER SHE STILL WITHHOLDS THE FACT THAT SHE IS NOT JUST A MAID AT THE HOTEL. AND THAT FACT THAT SHE HAD RECEIVED HER GED AND HAS HER AA DEGREE AND IS CURRENTLY GOING TO COLLEGE FOR HER BACHLORS DEGREE. THE ONLY ONE THAT KNOWS THAT IS HER BOSS AND FRIEND WHOM OWNS THE HOTEL. SHE ALSO IS STARTING TO FALL FOR THE BOSSES GRANDSON WHO IS MOVING BACK TO LOS LOBOS. HER AND QUINN MAKE SUCH A GREAT COUPLE. EVEN IF SHE THINKS ITS JUST FOR FUN. BECAUSE WHY IN THE WORLD WOULD A RICH MUSIC PRODUCER WHO IS HOTTER THAN THE SUN WANT SOMEONE LIKE HER. COURTNEY IS SOMEWHAT OF A KLUTZ. SHE HAS LOW SELF ESTEEM AND SELF CONFIDENCE. I CAN IDENTIFY WITH HER ON A FEW LEVELS. I MYSELF HAVE LOW SELF ESTEEM AND CONFIDENCE PUT TEND TO HIDE IT WELL JUST LIKE HER. I ALSO TEND TO KEEP ALOT TO MYSELF WHERE MY PERSONAL LIFE IS CONCERNED.

I LIKED HOW THE STORY CAME TOGETHER. GREAT PACE. GREAT RESOLUTIONS. THE ONLY THING THAT I WASNT TO THRILLED WITH WAS HOW THINGS WERE LEFT WITH SIENNA. YES SHE GOT HER RESLOUTION FROM HER ENGAGEMENT. BUT I AM LEFT TO WONDER IF HER AND THE BEST FRIEND AND FIRST BROKEN ENGAGEMENT GUY ACTUALLY GOT TOGETHER. WILL THAT BE IN ANOTHER BOOK OR WILL THAT BE ALL WE SEE OF THE WATSON SISTERS. ALL IN ALL IT WAS A REALLY GREAT STORY.
